heading: Pinnacle Swamp vs Piora — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pinnacle Swamp, New South Wales and Piora, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pinnacle Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Piora (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pinnacle Swamp or Piora safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pinnacle Swamp has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Piora scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pinnacle Swamp scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Piora scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pinnacle Swamp or Piora?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pinnacle Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
